rationale: The proposed statutory amendment to Tax Code §11.13(b) does not conflict with Gov't Code §2001.029, which governs agency public-comment procedures. Any implementing rulemaking would proceed under normal §2001.029 requirements.
quote: Before adopting a rule, a state agency shall give all interested persons a reasonable opportunity to submit data, views, or arguments, orally or in writing.
_note: No conflict; §2001.029 is a procedural rule for agency rulemaking and is unaffected by the substantive homestead exemption amount change.
